author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Skull and Bones: Y3S1 Epic Ship Skin
Introducing the new Burning Beast Epic skin forged exclusively for the Sambuk.
A blazing nightmare built to leave enemy ships drowning in ash and fire.
 
Available Now 🔥
 
#SkullAndBones @ShatteredSeas

About Skull and Bones:
Skull and Bones is an open‑world naval action RPG where no one rules the sea. Ship combat, build choice, and sailing skill define your legend. Play solo or team up with two friends to conquer rival ships and mythical beasts in a vast ocean of up to 20 players.

#Ubisoft #SkullandBones

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com
